copyPolicy: Inventory only in P0. No runtime source is authorized for copying.

nodes.runtimeRole: Creates the sole canonical Vue app, Pinia instance, router, analysis engine, and mount.
nodes.knownUnsafeInfrastructureBoundary: Canonical bootstrap injects an analysis engine and source runtime state beyond P0 scope.
nodes.notes: Target bootstrap is independently minimal and does not copy this file.

nodes.runtimeRole: Defines canonical routes, lazy page composition, history, redirects, and auth guard.
nodes.knownUnsafeInfrastructureBoundary: Canonical auth/query handoff persists browser tokens in legacy infrastructure; target must use the server/session ADR.
nodes.notes: P0 target creates only a neutral root route. Product routes are documented, not implemented.

directConsumers: all active Vue feature containers through installed Pinia
nodes.runtimeRole: Installs Pinia; stores are registered on demand rather than through a central registry.
nodes.knownUnsafeInfrastructureBoundary: Several source stores use localStorage/sessionStorage and must not be copied without persistence/security review.
nodes.notes: Target P0 has one empty Pinia foundation and no product stores.

nodes.runtimeRole: Canonical visual and interaction authority for the teaching workspace.
nodes.knownUnsafeInfrastructureBoundary: Direct API/storage/auth dependencies and unlicensed assets require adapters/gates.
nodes.notes: P0 copies no implementation and claims no visual parity.

nodes.runtimeRole: Defines active teaching shell regions, panel composition, and canonical geometry.
nodes.knownUnsafeInfrastructureBoundary: WorkspaceRightPanelAdapter and TeachingLiveRightPanel are non-closure nodes and must not be mistaken for active authority.
nodes.notes: WorkspaceToolbar.vue is also outside active consumption.

nodes.runtimeRole: Self-developed SVG board renderer and interaction surface.
assetDependencies: twelve Merida PNG files through pieces.ts
nodes.knownUnsafeInfrastructureBoundary: No direct BoardView mount/behavior test; piece licenses unresolved.
nodes.notes: No third-party chessboard library exists in the canonical manifest.

nodes.runtimeRole: Maps piece codes to inlined Merida images for board, editor, and export.
assetDependencies: twelve Merida PNG candidates listed in ASSET_INVENTORY.json
nodes.knownUnsafeInfrastructureBoundary: Local provenance exists but no license/attribution record was found.
nodes.notes: All candidates excluded from target assets during P0.

nodes.runtimeRole: Transforms SVG square placement and interaction coordinates for board orientation.
nodes.notes: Exact orientation prop/derived-state contract requires symbol-level migration review.

nodes.runtimeRole: Renders and positions board coordinates inside the SVG geometry.
nodes.notes: Rendered coordinate accessibility needs a future direct board test.

nodes.runtimeRole: Maps pointer click selection to moves, setup edits, and annotations.
nodes.knownUnsafeInfrastructureBoundary: No direct rendered click behavior test.

nodes.runtimeRole: Tracks drag source/target and dispatches move or editor operations.
nodes.knownUnsafeInfrastructureBoundary: No direct rendered drag behavior test.

nodes.runtimeRole: Provides board/FEN transformations used by legal move and setup flows.
nodes.notes: Exact legal-move dispatch also resides in BoardView/pgnStore and must be reviewed as one slice.

nodes.runtimeRole: Renders selected-square state and routes subsequent interaction.
Derives and renders last-move square markers.
Renders king-in-check marker within the SVG state overlay.
nodes.notes: Requires future direct rendered-state test.

nodes.runtimeRole: Canonical radial annotation control.
nodes.knownUnsafeInfrastructureBoundary: Keyboard/focus behavior lacks direct component evidence.

nodes.runtimeRole: Typed annotation shape model including arrows.
Typed square-highlight annotation model.
Typed box/region annotation model.
Maps canonical annotation colors between YCDW and rendered shapes.
nodes.knownUnsafeInfrastructureBoundary: Final visual values must be extracted into the target token registry, not copied into feature code.

nodes.runtimeRole: Parses and serializes width-bearing YCDW annotation fields.
nodes.notes: Exact field-to-width semantics remain in the canonical parser and tests.

nodes.runtimeRole: Preserves canonical annotation style metadata through YCDW round trips.
Parses L/S/G/U/A fields, unknown fields, ordinary comments, corrupt-field isolation, and analysis payloads.
nodes.notes: Unknown-field and plain-comment preservation are compatibility requirements.

nodes.runtimeRole: Serializes canonical annotations and analysis payloads without losing unknown fields/comments.
Canonical promotion selection dialog.
nodes.knownUnsafeInfrastructureBoundary: Naive UI must remain behind a project-owned adapter and focus behavior needs browser evidence.

nodes.runtimeRole: Presents variation branch choices during navigation/input.
nodes.knownUnsafeInfrastructureBoundary: Naive UI boundary and focus behavior require adapter/browser validation.

nodes.runtimeRole: Canonical free-setup board editor panel.
nodes.knownUnsafeInfrastructureBoundary: Piece assets are blocked by the rights gate.

nodes.runtimeRole: Canonical PGN collection, selection, tree, move index, and mutation owner.
nodes.knownUnsafeInfrastructureBoundary: Source persistence is not adopted; target persistence remains governed by the target persistence authority.

nodes.runtimeRole: Parses headers, main line, branches, comments, NAGs, and YCDW annotations into the canonical tree.
Serializes canonical PGN trees, branches, comments, NAGs, and annotations.
Creates and mutates PGN variation branches while preserving annotations.
Separates/preserves ordinary PGN comments alongside YCDW metadata.
Normalizes and presents Numeric Annotation Glyph semantics.
Canonical move-list selection and PGN navigation surface.
nodes.knownUnsafeInfrastructureBoundary: Rendered navigation has no direct component test in the inspected evidence.

nodes.runtimeRole: Provides move stepping/navigation used by replay and analysis.
nodes.notes: Import from replay to analysis must remain explicit.

nodes.runtimeRole: Renders canonical teaching-live round/pairing/player information in the active left-panel closure.
nodes.knownUnsafeInfrastructureBoundary: Fallback avatar license unresolved; live transport remains blocked.
nodes.notes: Inactive right-panel player components are explicitly not treated as closure authority.

nodes.runtimeRole: Normalizes PGN game/player/event headers for display and editing.
Canonical global analysis controls, progress, results, chart, and report UI.
nodes.knownUnsafeInfrastructureBoundary: AI must remain disabled during ongoing games; export depends on unlicensed pieces.

nodes.runtimeRole: Renders current evaluation using canonical orientation/state behavior.
nodes.knownUnsafeInfrastructureBoundary: Final evaluation colors must be extracted into the global token registry.

nodes.runtimeRole: Owns global analysis lifecycle, progress, results, and PGN annotation write-back.
nodes.knownUnsafeInfrastructureBoundary: Concurrency and persistence boundaries require explicit cancellation/stale-result and Dexie review.
nodes.notes: Results serialize into YCDW:A.

nodes.runtimeRole: Canonical single-move analysis dialog and result presentation.
nodes.knownUnsafeInfrastructureBoundary: Naive UI must be wrapped; AI disabled state for live games is mandatory.

nodes.runtimeRole: Creates a 2..6 worker pool and falls back to in-process TypeScript search on worker failure/stall.
nodes.knownUnsafeInfrastructureBoundary: No direct Worker/CSP/bundle test; main-thread fallback can cause UI latency.
nodes.notes: No WASM, Stockfish, Lozza, or model asset is in the active closure.

nodes.runtimeRole: Coordinates concurrent analysis requests and lifecycle/cancellation behavior.
nodes.knownUnsafeInfrastructureBoundary: Exact cancellation guarantees must be proven in a dedicated migration test; current file is orchestration, not the Worker entry.

nodes.runtimeRole: Coordinates request identity/lifecycle so superseded analysis cannot overwrite current state.
nodes.knownUnsafeInfrastructureBoundary: Dedicated stale-result race evidence must be retained during migration.

directImports: Vitest test modules for teaching, board, PGN, YCDW, AI, stores, API adapters, auth, and tournament behavior
nodes.runtimeRole: Forty-seven canonical behavior evidence files; not runtime code.
stateDependencies: test-specific real local stores; tests/setup localStorage shim
assetDependencies: asset wiring assertions in account/tournament tests
nodes.knownUnsafeInfrastructureBoundary: No direct BoardView mount, Worker entry/CSP, rendered CSS, or favicon/base-path test.
nodes.notes: P0 target does not copy product fixtures or tests.

nodes.runtimeRole: Canonical global UI variables, light/dark values, reset, and shell styling evidence.
nodes.knownUnsafeInfrastructureBoundary: Values must be extracted/reconciled into one target registry; source has no dedicated rendered-CSS test.
nodes.notes: src/styles/board.css contains comments/registration only; BoardView scoped CSS is authoritative for the board.

nodes.runtimeRole: Primary direct asset import manifest; additional favicon/avatar/tournament icon consumers are enumerated in ASSET_INVENTORY.json.
nodes.knownUnsafeInfrastructureBoundary: No license/attribution record found for any checked candidate.
nodes.notes: See ASSET_INVENTORY.json for exact paths, hashes, consumers, duplicates, exclusions, and legacy variants.
